expectations.text: Reads session JSONL transcripts (not just CHANGELOG)
expectations.evidence: Report states '27 JSONL transcripts' analyzed. Extracted '40 user correction events' and '8 assistant error admissions' from JSONL.
Section 3 'Rule Compliance Audit' lists violations (anti-drift, quality, efficiency, session-hygiene) and compliant rules (6 listed). All 11 rules covered.

expectations.text: Categorizes findings using taxonomy (RULE_VIOLATION, RULE_GAP, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Uses custom categories: stop-command, explicit-reminder, error-flag, anti-sycophancy, breakage, caution, negation. Does NOT use the insights skill taxonomy.

expectations.text: Each proposal cites specific session evidence
expectations.evidence: Each pattern cites session IDs (b6481cfa, 364598d4, 0eb6439c) and quotes user messages verbatim.
Section 3.3 has specific recommendations per rule with concrete wording to add.

expectations.text: Does NOT auto-apply changes to rules/skills/hooks

expectations.evidence: Report saved to workspace outputs dir only.
